title: Traders from East China region in the plasticizing industry visited our company for study and exchange
contentHtml: On June 10, business representatives from Zhejiang Chuangjin Petrochemical Co., Ltd., a regional trader in the plastics industry in East China, came to our company for study and exchange. The company's chairman Zeng Shengwen and senior executives Yue Yunbo, Zhao Wentao, Ma Jinshu and Liu Yanjie warmly received them.ChuangjinpetrochemicalWe have cooperated with our company for many years. After visiting and inspecting, we expressed that we very much agree with our company’s management model and entrepreneurial spirit. As representatives of the plasticizing industry, we are willing to strengthen in-depth cooperation with our company in the East China market to advance and prosper together! Mr. Wan of Chuangjin Petrochemical and our company's chairman Zeng Shengwen are both Jiangxi merchants working abroad and fellow villagers, and their words are very cordial. At the same time, he also lamented the difficulty of working hard outside, paying equal attention to honor and responsibility. Through this exchange, both parties expressed their willingness to strengthen and deepen cooperation and create brilliance together!
titleZh: 塑化行业华东区域贸易商到访我公司学习交流
contentHtmlZh: 6月10日，塑化行业华东区域贸易商浙江创锦石化有限公司业务代表来我公司学习交流，公司董事长曾胜文及高层岳云波、赵文涛、马金树、刘艳杰热情接待。创锦石化与我公司合作多年，参观考察后表示十分认同我公司的管理模式及企业精神。同为塑化行业代表，愿意加强华东市场与我公司的深切合作，共进退，共繁荣！创锦石化万总与我公司董事长曾胜文同为在外打拼的江西客商，同为老乡，言语之间倍感亲切。同时也感叹在外打拼的艰难，荣誉责任并重。通过此次交流，双方表示愿意加强深化合作，共创辉煌！
